name: Overwolf
description: Platform for building and monetizing in-game apps and mods. Provides a native overlay SDK, app store, and creator fund used by developers to extend popular PC games.

seo.title: Overwolf — Game Development Tools
seo.meta_description: Overwolf: Platform for building and monetizing in-game apps and mods. Provides a native overlay SDK, app store, and creator fund used by developers to extend po

when_to_use: In-game overlay app built with Overwolf SDK and distributed
Game stats tracker app monetized via Overwolf creator fund
Map callout overlay mod shipped for a popular FPS title
DPS meter app for an MMO integrated using Overwolf game events
In-game shop overlay delivering branded content to players

pros: Direct monetization path for mod and overlay developers
Creator fund provides grants to new developers
Proven user base across League, CS, WoW, and Valorant
Ads and subscriptions handled by the platform
cons: Limited to a small set of supported host games
Ad-based monetization shapes user perception negatively
Overlay tech occasionally conflicts with anti-cheat
Developer share after fees can be underwhelming
review.verdict: Unique niche if you want to build monetized mods or overlays for hit games; tiny TAM for anything else.
review.best_for: Developers building overlays, stat trackers, or mods for supported popular PC games
review.not_for: Standalone game developers or anyone not targeting supported host games

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
